findings.description: The テスト実施 section and its content are missing from the knowledge file. The source states: 'テストケースに従ってテストを実施する。' — this is a procedural instruction for the test execution step. The knowledge file preserves the note about DBダンプ from this section but silently drops the section heading and its main instruction.
findings.source_evidence:
